title: Cdk8s Library
description: Scaffold a new cdk8s catalog library (jsii config, mkdocs site, per-kind construct layout), following the pattern documented in docs/building-a-library.md.

name.description: Short, kebab-case library name (e.g. "ingress-nginx"). Used for the packages/<name> folder and the @cdk-x/<name> npm package.
name.x-prompt: What is the short (kebab-case) name of the library?

description.description: One-line description of what the library deploys - used in package.json, mkdocs.yml and docs/libraries/index.md.

keywords.description: Extra npm keywords, added alongside the base cdk8s/cdk/constructs/kubernetes keywords.
